response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering depth with 15+ years of senior-level experience, this role requires a complete skill-set mismatch. The candidate lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (a required qualification), has outdated C expertise (last used in 2014-2015), and shows no background in embedded networking security, network protocols (SNMP, NETCONF, Layer-2/3), or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X). Recent work focuses on full-stack web development and AI infrastructure, not embedded firmware development.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience with proven ability to architect complex systems across multiple technical domains
Linux systems experience including CI/CD infrastructure, DevOps tooling, and system-level performance optimization work
Strong mentoring and technical leadership background with open-source contributions demonstrating engineering craftsmanship
concerns: Required native-level Japanese language proficiency is completely absent; resume shows English, Romanian, and basic German only
No embedded networking or security domain expertise; no experience with network protocols, switch operation, encryption/authentication systems, or attack detection
C programming proficiency is 10+ years outdated (2014-2015); recent career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript for web and AI applications, not C-based embedded systems

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking security domain expertise
Outdated C skills; recent work in unrelated web/AI stack
